
  // Type_list
  public class Type_list {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var generic_list : Generic_list?
  }
  // Generic_list_any
  public class Generic_list_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any {
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_list
    }
  }
  // Generic_list
  public class Generic_list {
    // p_anylist
    public func p_anylist(
    ) -> Type_anylist {
      return e_anylist
    }
    // p_listany
    public func p_listany(
    ) -> [Type_any] {
      return []
    }
  }
  // Generic_list_list
  public class Generic_list_list : Vx_Core.Generic_list {
  }
  // Generic_list_type
  public class Generic_list_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_list = v_list_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_list = v_list_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_list = v_list_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_list = f_list(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
  }
  // v_list_constructor
  public static func v_list_constructor(
  ) -> Type_list {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_list()
  }
  // v_list_create
  public static func v_list_create(
  ) -> Type_list {
    var output : Type_list = v_list_constructor()
    v_list_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_list_register
  public static func v_list_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_list_startup_type()
    v_list_startup_empty()
    return t_list
  }
  // v_list_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_list_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_list
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_list_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.type_list = Vx_Core.e_list
  }
  // v_list_startup - mutating
  public static func v_list_startup(
    _ value : Type_list
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_list_any = Generic_list_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_list,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_list_startup_empty
  public static func v_list_startup_empty() {
    v_list_startup(e_list)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_list,
      e_list.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_list_startup_type
  public static func v_list_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_list
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/list")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.c_extends_list
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_list_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_list
  public static func v_any_from_list(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_list
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_list_from_any
  public static func v_list_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_list {
    let generic_any : Vx_Core.Generic_any = Vx_Core.v_generic_any_from_any(type_any)
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_list = generic_any.p_type_list()
    return output
  }
  // v_list_new_from_any_generic_list
  public static func v_list_new_from_any_generic_list(
    _ type_any : Type_any,
    _ generic_list : Generic_list
  ) -> Type_list {
    let output : Type_list = Type_list()
    output.type_any = type_any
    output.generic_list = generic_list
    generic_list.type_any = type_any
    return output
  }
  // v_list_copy
  public static func v_list_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_list,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_list {
    return copyval
  }
  // f_list
  public static func f_list(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_list {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_list = v_list_copy(e_list, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_list : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_list : Type_list = v_list_constructor()
